host_mirror_notes: Userland-only mirror for Mixtar Toolkit work.
OpenBSD source roots kept: bin, sbin, usr.bin, usr.sbin, lib, libexec, include.
Kernel/GNU/regression/distribution/share/etc/game roots and root build metadata are intentionally absent.
Required sys/tree.h macro header is vendored into Toolkit/Bridge/include/sys/tree.h.
pruned_policy: userland-only mirror; removed gnu, sys, regress, distrib, share, etc, games, and root build metadata
